title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Franky, Robin, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samuel- Pirate Alliance started this raid with an army of 5,400...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After a valiant struggle and OTAMA's Kibi Dango strategy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The disparity in military strength has shrunk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you swear allegiance to a man like him, Fukurok.ju?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The oniwabanshu must always serve the current shogun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where do your loyalties lie?! You're clinging onto a ghost!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've given away where your real body is!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were never suited to be a Ninja! It doesn't matter how adept you are at Ninjutsu,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You always wore your heart on your sleeve!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They are the reason we cannot rest!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
